title: Supply Chain Manager - Go First Cargo - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Go First Cargo - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Go First Cargo family as a Supply Chain Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Go First Cargo:
Go First Cargo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Go First Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
